name: Lute of Thunderous Thumping
description:
This reinforced {@item lute|XPHB} can be wielded as a magic Club that deals an extra {@damage 2d8} Thunder damage on a hit.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Sing and Swing", "entries": ["If you're a Bard, you can use your Charisma modifier instead of your Strength modifier when making a melee attack roll with the {@item lute|XPHB}, provided you sing or hum while making the attack."]}
